name: Unreal Engine 5 MCP bridge
description: Detects UE5 and prepares a local record for UnrealMCP-based integration.

install.command: npm install -g unrealcli && py -3.12 -m pip install --user unrealmcp

rollbackNotes: Delete the workspace engine-bridges/unreal folder and remove the Unreal MCP entry from .mcp.json.
